wine_experiences.name: Air Escargot Hot-Air Balloon over the Vineyards
wine_experiences.description: Hot-air balloon flights over the Burgundy vineyards between Beaune, Nuits-Saint-Georges, Chalon-sur-Saone and Macon, taking in the Hospices de Beaune and the Solutre and Vergisson rocks of the Maconnais.
wine_experiences.duration: Around 1 hour 30 minutes aloft, roughly 3 hours total with inflation and landing
wine_experiences.group_size: Shared baskets, private flights on request

wine_experiences.name: France Montgolfieres Balloon Ride from Beaune
wine_experiences.description: Sunrise and late-afternoon balloon flights departing near Beaune over the Cote de Beaune climats, drifting above the Grand Cru and Premier Cru slopes during the April to October flying season.
wine_experiences.duration: Around 1 hour aloft, roughly 3 hours total with the experience
wine_experiences.group_size: Shared baskets, private flights on request

wine_experiences.name: Chateau de Pommard Harvest Experience
wine_experiences.description: September harvest day at biodynamic Chateau de Pommard, picking in the Clos Marey-Monge monopole, sorting grapes, tasting fermenting juices and sharing a casse-croute in the vines with the cellar team.
wine_experiences.duration: Full day during the September vendange

wine_experiences.name: Chateau de Pommard Winemaking and Blending Workshop
wine_experiences.description: Immersive winemaking experience at Chateau de Pommard with winemaker Emmanuel Sala, exploring biodynamic technique and the Clos Marey-Monge terroir before tasting Pinot Noirs from different plots and vintages.

wine_experiences.name: 2CV Bourgogne Tours Vintage Vineyard Drive
wine_experiences.neighborhood: Cote de Beaune and Cote de Nuits
wine_experiences.description: Guided drives through the Cote de Beaune or Cote de Nuits at the wheel of a classic Citroen 2CV, with a wine guide, a cellar visit and tastings of Burgundy crus including Grand Cru along the Route des Grands Crus.

wine_experiences.name: Bourgogne Evasion Bike and Wine Day in the Cote de Beaune
wine_experiences.description: Guided one-day cycling tour through the Cote de Beaune and Hautes-Cotes vineyards, with a vineyard wine tasting and explanations of Burgundy grape varieties and terroir along the climats.
